backend.changelog: Generate UI counts (STEP/3DPDF/THUMB) now report the true on-disk state on re-runs instead of undercounting by sub-component files written under baseName fallback. Three-layer fix: frontend collectItemInfo synthesises {name}.SLDPRT/SLDASM fallback keys for itemInfoMap so the agent's platform-key lookup hits when the _cadFilename hint is null; SW post-Generate refresh now passes expectedPdf3D + sets genStatus.pdf3d (V5 path already did this -- SW path was the inconsistency); agent-side cache-hit branches across STEP / Thumb / PDF / DXF / 3D PDF / co-save STEP / V5 STEP now add the on-disk filename to result.GeneratedFiles[*]. result.GeneratedFiles[*] semantics shift from 'freshly written this run' to 'present on disk after this run' (numeric result.Generated counter unchanged). Requires CadBridge 1.8.36 -- bumps land together. Also tightens the Settings -> Telemetry card: disclosure paragraph moves into the toggle's hover tooltip; last-sent + install-id collapse to a single row.

cadBridge.changelog: Cache-hit Skipped++ branches across STEP / Thumb / PDF / DXF / 3D PDF / STEP co-save / V5 STEP now also add the on-disk filename to result.GeneratedFiles[type]. Pre-1.8.36 only fresh-writes appended, which caused frontend's post-Generate checkGenerated to fall back to BOM-derived expected names on re-runs and undercount by 2 when sub-components were written under baseName fallback. result.GeneratedFiles[type] semantics now mean 'present on disk after this run', not 'freshly written this run'. Pairs with backend 1.1.6 -- bumps land together. Mirrors V5DrawingsGenerator cache-hit precedent (already correct since 2026-05-10).
